critic_notes: Six questions on Festlegung der Umsetzungsreihenfolge (section 9.3). All correct answers well-supported by source. Question 002 (difficulty 'experte') tests a genuine edge case about collision between Basis/Standard classification and logical dependencies, which does require synthesis -- appropriate difficulty. Question 003 has a minor line-break space artifact in quote. Question 006 has OCR artifacts inherited from source ('erffllt', 'durchzuffhrende') and a line-break space in 'Ge fährdungen'; the difficulty 'experte' is borderline since the concept of simplified Risikoanalyse is stated directly, but the nuance about omitting Gefährdungsermittlung justifies it. Schema and pages correct.

issues.detail: Fragment 'einge schränkte' should be 'eingeschränkte'. Soft-hyphen line-break artifact -- matches under no-space normalization.

Fragment has 'Ge fährdungen' (space from line-break artifact) instead of 'Gefährdungen'. Also contains OCR artifacts 'erffllt' and 'durchzuffhrende' inherited from the source PDF-to-text conversion. Content is semantically correct; matches under no-space normalization.
